_meta.label: AFTER — incremental hnsw_rs backend (Phase 26 T7)
_meta.machine: same machine as the before-2k baseline
_meta.note: cold_recall_after_single_store now links one vector into the live graph in O(log n) and searches it directly — no rebuild. mean_us 307 vs the instant-distance baseline's 1449148 (~4700x faster on the store-then-recall loop). rebuild_ms=0 because the incremental graph is always current.
